name: Gelatin
description: Gelatin is a hydrolyzate derived from naturally occuring collagen. It is composed a mixture of peptides and proteins with varying molecular weights. They are produced from partial hydrolysis of collagen extracted from the skin, bones, and connective tissues of animals such as cattle and pigs [Wikipedia], resulting in individual collagen strands that are more readily rearranged. For over 125 years, gelatin has been used as a food gelling agent in manufacturing practice and ingredient in cosmetic products and pharmaceutical formulations [L998]. Gelaltin is generally recognized as safe (GRAS) by the FDA to be a non-hazardous food or food ingredient.
